# truenas_iscsi_portal (Data Source)

Provides information about an iSCSI portal on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_iscsi_portal" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "iscsi_portal_tag" {
  value = data.truenas_iscsi_portal.example.tag
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric iSCSI portal ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) Portal comment.
- `listen` (Attributes List) Listen addresses for the portal. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--listen))
- `tag` (Number) Portal group tag.

<a id="nestedatt--listen"></a>
### Nested Schema for `listen`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) Listen IP.
- `port` (Number) Listen port.
